query:
SELECT
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  SUM(total_amount) AS cache_total,
  SUM(principal) AS cache_principal,
  SUM(interest) AS cache_interest,
  SUM(fee) AS cache_fee,
  SUM(penalty) AS cache_penalty,
  SUM(overpaid) AS cache_overpaid,
  SUM(bad_debt) AS cache_bad_debt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 1 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS close_row_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS normal_row_total,
  COUNT(*) AS cache_rows
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-05'
GROUP BY DATE(paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date ASC;

SELECT
  DATE(paid_at) AS paid_date,
  SUM(total_amount) AS cache_total,
  SUM(principal) AS cache_principal,
  SUM(interest) AS cache_interest,
  SUM(fee) AS cache_fee,
  SUM(penalty) AS cache_penalty,
  SUM(overpaid) AS cache_overpaid,
  SUM(bad_debt) AS cache_bad_debt,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 1 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS close_row_total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_close_row = 0 THEN total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS normal_row_total,
  COUNT(*) AS cache_rows
FROM debt_collected_cache
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND DATE(paid_at) BETWEEN '2026-04-01' AND '2026-04-05'
GROUP BY DATE(paid_at)
ORDER BY paid_date ASC;
